dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6260 RH: Keeping Violent Offenders Off Our Streets Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fitzgerald (for himself, Mr. Roy, Mr. Wied, and Mr. Steil) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary
Additional sponsors: Mr. Tiffany and Mr. Moore of North Carolina
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on November 21, 2025

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to prohibit fraud in connection with posting bail.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Keeping Violent Offenders Off Our Streets Act of 2025.

section.header: Fraud in connection with posting bail
section.text: Section 1033(f)(1)(A) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting before the comma the following: (including the posting of monetary bail, criminal bail bonds, and Federal immigration bail bonds).

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
